metadata.description: Sixteen installable skills for diagnosing, designing, governing, and scaling enterprise AI transformation — distilled from 21 flagship research sources (Stanford, MIT, McKinsey, BCG, Deloitte, PwC, Accenture, NIST, EU AI Act, IMDA, WEF).

plugins.name: enterprise-ai-transformation-skills
plugins.description: Decision frameworks, diagnostic tools, and gate criteria for enterprise AI transformation — grouped into four buckets: general (strategy/diagnosis), process (pilot/ship/observe), tech (stack/sourcing/data/agents), people (leadership/workforce/frontline).
